overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through a futuristic urban environment at golden hour, transitioning from a narrow service alley onto a busy downtown street and proceeding through a covered underpass with digital billboards and neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley opening to main street

events.description: exiting narrow concrete corridor into open urban street with visible traffic

agents.ego_description: walking forward through the narrow alley and emerging onto the open sidewalk

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with metal ventilation grating running along the left side of the narrow passage
horizontal metal slats embedded in the concrete wall for ventilation
tall palm tree visible ahead marking the transition to the open street
futuristic building with distinctive glass dome structure and neon signage
large concrete overpass bridge spanning the street ahead with signage

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow concrete service alley with ventilation grating on the left wall. As the character walks forward, the space opens up to reveal a futuristic downtown street with palm trees, the distinctive El Guapo building with its glass dome on the right, and the La Huesuda overpass visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open downtown street with futuristic mega-structures

events.description: camera tilts upward to view the towering cyberpunk mega-tower facade
camera tilts back down to forward-facing walking position

agents.ego_description: walking forward while looking up at the towering building architecture, then continuing toward the underpass

entered.detail: massive futuristic skyscraper with red and blue illuminated panels and geometric architecture

segments.scene_description: Walking along the open sidewalk, the character pauses to look up at a massive cyberpunk mega-tower with illuminated red and blue facade panels. The La Huesuda overpass grows larger as we approach it, while moderate traffic flows along the multi-lane street. The El Guapo building remains visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass with mixed lighting

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the La Huesuda overpass
transition from golden hour sunlight to artificial underpass lighting with neon accents

agents.ego_description: walking under the concrete overpass structure alongside moving traffic

notable_agents.action: person wearing an orange jacket walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large illuminated digital screen displaying a health warning about smoking with bold text
massive concrete support columns for the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters the shadowy underpass beneath the La Huesuda overpass, where the lighting shifts from warm sunlight to cooler artificial illumination. Large digital billboards line the left wall, including a prominent health warning sign. A pedestrian in an orange jacket walks toward the camera as vehicles pass on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban tunnel with digital advertising

events.description: fully artificial neon lighting dominates as natural light is completely blocked

agents.ego_description: continuing through the underpass, passing illuminated advertisements and neon signage

entered.detail: illuminated advertisement panel with 'AVANTE' branding and cyan accent lighting
digital screen displaying 'PUNCHER' advertisement with graphic imagery

segments.scene_description: Deep within the underpass, the environment is illuminated entirely by artificial neon lighting and digital screens. The character passes the Avante and Puncher advertisements on the left wall while continuing toward the distant exit where daylight is visible. The space feels enclosed and tunnel-like with concrete walls and ceiling.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined service alley into a sprawling futuristic downtown before descending into a neon-lit urban underpass. It begins in a narrow concrete alley with ventilation grating, moving forward as the space opens up to reveal a sunlit street featuring palm trees and the glass dome of the El Guapo building. As the character walks along the sidewalk, the camera tilts up toward a massive mega-tower with red and blue facade panels while approaching the looming La Huesuda overpass. The scene then shifts from warm golden hour sunlight to cool artificial illumination as the character enters the shadowy underpass, passing digital billboards and a pedestrian in an orange jacket. Finally, the environment becomes entirely enclosed and tunnel-like, guided by the glow of Avante and Puncher advertisements on the concrete walls while heading toward a distant exit of daylight.
